---
title: "🚀 Tasks"
format: html
---


## Task 7 {#sec-task-interp-density}

Follow the instructions in [Submission via GitHub Pages](submission.qmd#sec-gh-pages) to create a new repo in the existing organization. Do the exercises in [Density Estimation](interpolation-density.qmd#sec-density) and [Interpolation](interpolation-methods.qmd#sec-interpolation) in a file named `index.qmd`. The task is due in two weeks.
